query:
ALTER TABLE approvalInstances 
ADD COLUMN entryMethod ENUM('qr_code', 'rfid', 'card') NULL,
ADD COLUMN qrCodeData VARCHAR(500) NULL,
ADD COLUMN rfidTag VARCHAR(100) NULL,
ADD COLUMN cardNumber VARCHAR(100) NULL,
ADD COLUMN accessGrantedBy INT NULL,
ADD COLUMN accessGrantedAt TIMESTAMP NULL;
